title: Deep Learning & Reinforcement Learning in a Simple Grid World
description: This diagram illustrates the integration of Deep Learning (DL) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) within a Simple Grid World environment. It shows how an agent perceives the state, takes actions, receives rewards, and uses a deep neural network to approximate the optimal policy.
relationships: Grid World Environment provides State to Agent
Agent uses Policy Network to select Action based on State
Environment transitions to new State and provides Reward
Reward and new State are stored in Replay Buffer
Agent samples experiences from Replay Buffer
Policy Network is updated using Loss Function and Gradient Descent
Updated Policy influences future Action Selection
